name: Steve Chabot
subject: Time for a Second Contract With America
body:
Promises made, promises kept... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [It's Time for a Second Contract With America](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Democrats now control both Congress and the Presidency. Changing that sorry state of affairs will require dramatic action. In my opinion, a second Contract With America. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Judge President Biden by his Actions, Not by his Words](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-d/)
Joe Biden preaches unity. His actions are far from it. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [The Inaugural Address Joe Biden Should Give (But Probably Won't)](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-u/)
At noon today, on the West front of the Capitol building, Joe Biden will be sworn in as the 46th President of the United States. I'll be there. Here's the speech he ought to give (but probably won't.) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Time for Healing](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-n/)
It's been one week since the tragic attack on the US Capitol Building. This week the 25th Amendment and another impeachment are on the table. Here are my thoughts. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juutkktt-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Ben Wessel
subject: We miss you!
body:
Tell us what issues matter to you.

| | | We value your opinion. We want to hear from you.
---
| [Take our survey](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24626514/271295378/1051667586?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQzNWE2YS0wYTY3LWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mvr7dvEPuL2lQwFpqjrSf73_73Bnh0hE72FOQwFfVSU=&emci=d7d9621e-5566-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=2fd35a6a-0a67-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**It’s been a minute, but we want you to know that we value your voice.** Your input will become the blueprint for how we lead and prioritize our national campaigns. Team NextGen showed up time and time again during the 2020 election cycle — and we led one of the largest youth organizing campaigns in America on our own terms.
At the start of this year, when confronted by a global health pandemic, we found ground-breaking ways to reach high-opportunity voters and activate the youth vote through online tactics. At the end of this year, when Donald Trump dangerously attempted to spread disinformation about his embarrassing loss, we refused to back down.
**Listening to our community has gotten us this far, and we aren’t stopping now.**
As we shape our vision for 2021 and beyond, we believe it is absolutely crucial to make sure your interests and perspectives are heard.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24626515/271295379/648383059?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQzNWE2YS0wYTY3LWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mvr7dvEPuL2lQwFpqjrSf73_73Bnh0hE72FOQwFfVSU=&emci=d7d9621e-5566-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=2fd35a6a-0a67-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=6787172)
[**We’ve crafted a short survey that you can fill out, so we know what issues are top of mind for you and what actions you hope the Biden-Harris administration will prioritize during their time in office. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24626516/271295380/-514416355?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQzNWE2YS0wYTY3LWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mvr7dvEPuL2lQwFpqjrSf73_73Bnh0hE72FOQwFfVSU=&emci=d7d9621e-5566-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=2fd35a6a-0a67-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=6787172)
You deserve a seat at the table, and we are here to listen.
[Take our survey](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24626517/271295381/-2080500296?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQzNWE2YS0wYTY3LWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mvr7dvEPuL2lQwFpqjrSf73_73Bnh0hE72FOQwFfVSU=&emci=d7d9621e-5566-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=2fd35a6a-0a67-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=6787172 "Sign up to text")

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Black History
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
February is Black History Month. As we reflect on the history of Black Tennesseans, we must also keep laser focused on the future. I’m the first Black Chair elected to the TNDP, and it can’t stop there. Over 16% of Tennessee’s population is Black – a population whose vote has been marginalized and undervalued. We must elevate the voices of Black Tennesseans if we are going to turn Tennessee Blue in 2022.
Stacy Abrams gave us all a masterclass on how to register and mobilize minority voters. The biggest lesson is that she didn’t do it overnight. Her efforts in Georgia took years, and in 2020 they finally paid off. We need to implement the same tactics in Tennessee.
We know what we have to do, now we just need the resources. Will you make a donation right now, and help the TNDP raise the resources we need to make the voices of ALL Tennesseans count? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/hendrell.png]

clean_body: [] Peter, February is Black History Month. As we reflect on the history of Black Tennesseans, we must also keep laser focused on the future. I’m the first Black Chair elected to the TNDP, and it can’t stop there. Over 16% of Tennessee’s population is Black – a population whose vote has been marginalized and undervalued. We must elevate the voices of Black Tennesseans if we are going to turn Tennessee Blue in 2022. Stacy Abrams gave us all a masterclass on how to register and mobilize minority voters. The biggest lesson is that she didn’t do it overnight. Her efforts in Georgia took years, and in 2020 they finally paid off. We need to implement the same tactics in Tennessee. We know what we have to do, now we just need the resources. Will you make a donation right now, and help the TNDP raise the resources we need to make the voices of ALL Tennesseans count? [] [] Thank you, Hendrell Remus [] Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. I'm a small business owner, an innovator, and a problem solver, but most importantly, [_**I 'm a disruptor running to restore common sense leadership here in Virginia.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ESd9TW9esA65mc3i5MW5ud4XqkV8ajdhUQT-4Ru-SAJmKfEnKC1ZmnIqH9mbd3vCRBK5KMJirDWsE76HVbmyB9coqglOfQqFp9N5tUz59COQCQU7ARNItltTYnOJAsH-AQ_3B3gYcKLP68XozjHn1MEuw0plrcphUpFiDTw7UQHmD33TXJ01W9yu8PanZDyX186t8BLR_ilhHEWm81M1xycHZioeUpPVaTNezIIuuEpkHzNEuHaJziOjO9A2B7OPDl8oDNLjFbUzrF9neWQdUhqAwOHn7fJBgEDGwwLjh_lw33g-z9Fd-j6m79C_w2ABvEAsEZusVi3n_ztCMDB1B4irQm1hArEDWJA1FuZNsOVTXGjgIgXTMvmko7248Ldtj8aMP0k9Qt_9OiRq22l7zg==&c=LlhvDnK0a8G_8tICaBy-HA76N5bBG_9vwG5UDw2AwjJgAuUAYJhP0A==&ch=H--aI1kngHFfIldc8WAsN03SX8mLNw9KwjK2U_3YVX_c5db_PxR8Vg==) As a small business owner, I know that our success is measured by our employees' quality of life, and I have always strived to put our people first. That's why I launched the Virginia 30 Day Fund and partnered with Barstool Sports to help save small businesses. The 30 Day Fund has helped save more than 1,000 small businesses across Virginia and more than 2,500 small businesses across America, raising more than $40 million and still counting. Small businesses are the lifeline of our communities across America. Unfortunately, despite the strides we have made to keep small businesses afloat, it's not enough. For too long, the systemic incompetence in Virginia, and frankly in America, has failed us. Governor Northam, McAuliffe, and the career politicians in Virginia were supposed to lead us through this pandemic. Almost a year later, our schools remain closed and small businesses are facing impossible regulatory hurdles to keep their doors open again. _**Our children are falling behind and small businesses are fighting to survive.**_ [_**T**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ESd9TW9esA65mc3i5MW5ud4XqkV8ajdhUQT-4Ru-SAJmKfEnKC1ZmnIqH9mbd3vCRBK5KMJirDWsE76HVbmyB9coqglOfQqFp9N5tUz59COQCQU7ARNItltTYnOJAsH-AQ_3B3gYcKLP68XozjHn1MEuw0plrcphUpFiDTw7UQHmD33TXJ01W9yu8PanZDyX186t8BLR_ilhHEWm81M1xycHZioeUpPVaTNezIIuuEpkHzNEuHaJziOjO9A2B7OPDl8oDNLjFbUzrF9neWQdUhqAwOHn7fJBgEDGwwLjh_lw33g-z9Fd-j6m79C_w2ABvEAsEZusVi3n_ztCMDB1B4irQm1hArEDWJA1FuZNsOVTXGjgIgXTMvmko7248Ldtj8aMP0k9Qt_9OiRq22l7zg==&c=LlhvDnK0a8G_8tICaBy-HA76N5bBG_9vwG5UDw2AwjJgAuUAYJhP0A==&ch=H--aI1kngHFfIldc8WAsN03SX8mLNw9KwjK2U_3YVX_c5db_PxR8Vg==) _**[hat is why Friend, I am running for governor.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ESd9TW9esA65mc3i5MW5ud4XqkV8ajdhUQT-4Ru-SAJmKfEnKC1ZmnIqH9mbd3vCRBK5KMJirDWsE76HVbmyB9coqglOfQqFp9N5tUz59COQCQU7ARNItltTYnOJAsH-AQ_3B3gYcKLP68XozjHn1MEuw0plrcphUpFiDTw7UQHmD33TXJ01W9yu8PanZDyX186t8BLR_ilhHEWm81M1xycHZioeUpPVaTNezIIuuEpkHzNEuHaJziOjO9A2B7OPDl8oDNLjFbUzrF9neWQdUhqAwOHn7fJBgEDGwwLjh_lw33g-z9Fd-j6m79C_w2ABvEAsEZusVi3n_ztCMDB1B4irQm1hArEDWJA1FuZNsOVTXGjgIgXTMvmko7248Ldtj8aMP0k9Qt_9OiRq22l7zg==&c=LlhvDnK0a8G_8tICaBy-HA76N5bBG_9vwG5UDw2AwjJgAuUAYJhP0A==&ch=H--aI1kngHFfIldc8WAsN03SX8mLNw9KwjK2U_3YVX_c5db_PxR8Vg==)**_ We need REAL conservative leadership to get Virginia leading again and to get our government focused on helping people across the Commonwealth rather than bowing to special interest groups. body:
We need your help to stop the Democrats' socialist agenda.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VZGQgs5ZSzJJ2XFhAoAHdYFP5zI7_AAOG-Y4MI9tveOZ1fOxSvMHVi_6GZo91Afai2X_uduY4PLI9uXnUS7AlFjWB_IwmNC4kaxwKybCOSTBInuGqQNGwfYQ6X3rqcY5Ai8smMJVZQJVLMmtLLzRdrEjvIcemVcHgIDKMqNyQzRr85JeO06YvP6LrCVPFfaL4QZ3FxsyFf_fqGWjqhtObHKzeJyxnomrJjvjl7TeQgFluv_uAnwUxop98u6pJdeRzgwrdqqRUBCCp_b5GFqkQswhfZnhBcroJc08nqYzvB_t2M1Rh7UPR4VZ5Zi-5Hc_HYcj2Rv8x2cDZjcdLYNrlJsUSNmfcNIYNm1kZnYWz7_aZUwFVXO4lGkTggHOTN4flMashPrL88vUtr90WB01HFMH4kCdxo9XoZLEIPWfsWJ64Q40QjdlFA==&c=_bhldQ14nIpdwkeITd9S_pbNrc1qjC2Rj9zHjyWV3aJG1uilpvvuPQ==&ch=8N1l93VJ6qsUutZO_VheypkSrOSmEbO_kEjX1XmsiUOLR79Xto_XRg==)
**FIRST:** Nancy Pelosi and the Far-Left spent $11 million attacking us last November.

**THEN:** Just weeks later, our opponent declared a rematch race for 2022. He's already started organizing against us, rallying his donors to chip into his campaign war chest.

**NOW:** The Democrats are determined to win back every seat they lost in November, including ours, in order to secure the House Majority once more.

body:
Friend,

Looking back, I am amazed at how much we were able to accomplish over the last few years.

From confirming HUNDREDS of judges to our HISTORIC tax cuts, Senate Republicans were able to do great work for the American people. But now, Friend, we're in trouble.

Democrats have taken control of the Senate and they're threatening to destroy ALL of our conservative progress.

This is why we need your help today, Friend. [**If we 're going to put a stop to the Democrats so we can implement our conservative agenda, we need you to rush an emergency contribution IMMEDIATELY>>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V28yxUKOX_mX9bgIiPrfnOplBszm6RoM89OcpMruR7_aIq6RSqsUA22ItZiXTzSYFyC1_tjMEHUqEHUVAqvvk0JQP_QeE5fR3LrzxdQnbg7bm3sCBeDZAjLtkXcpxoIlc4LD7wHtKaL_akyr79fKWoBDoKGPHq5FF_2T4dn1U_SsbtHh0FUPq8qCFzPI3_cLcdI_91s57EsywyeIaw2kPOCrjj_r4BqqH3dDnipHGGyigYBEpxGVzhbNGXLdhlDCCkeJHJHgF6P3TIpz8LteXJCUKRI4vZU-yHdVZauqanlDzIu5YgqJqUtbwJyPEId7c5H_hH3mFM_T7u8Fy2BD9Rzy6ludVhBzjVPAtsVlASadsBfcY46ZyUvf_xa9utkskmjIF2NmSSurDq-fY-86d1M0Lw9q_n8O3ZbTq05dTkM=&c=Knkoe_0NQ3AmG_nNGGwd98dmv5mlg0EgJOAptlPYWczG49PAXi3n_g==&ch=7sWm4ljhPG8ETpfJRv1vu8Ps4F0mfazBIbkHnwxx3UytdfYGXTyWvg==)

If you want Senate Republicans to preserve our accomplishments and continue forward with our conservative agenda, we need your support TODAY. Friend, California has seen enough.

_When it came to creating jobs, Gavin Newsom destroyed them.

When it came to tackling affordability, under Gavin's leadership taxes increased.

When it came to fighting for our economy, Newsom's administration regulated small businesses into failure and shut them down for months on end._

After 759 days in office, we've seen an endless stream of bad ideas that California will take years to recover from. It's time to say: Enough is enough.

We think Gavin is failing California, and we know we're not alone. Will you join the growing number of grassroots patriots.... What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF GINA RAIMONDO |
body:
Hi Friend,

Serving as Rhode Island's governor has been the honor of my lifetime. I will never be able to thank you enough for trusting me to deliver results for our state -- an adventure we began together ten years ago. I am grateful to our team, and to folks in every community across Rhode Island, who made our comeback possible. Rhode Island is, and always will be, my home.

While it is very difficult for me to be leaving Rhode Island, it is a privilege to be asked to serve as United States Commerce Secretary, and, if confirmed, I look forward to helping implement President Biden's vision for an inclusive recovery that lifts up those who have been left behind.

In many ways, that is a continuation of the work we have done together these past six years. We made record investments in public education and transportation infrastructure, partnered with businesses to get thousands of Rhode Islanders back to work, cut taxes and eliminated outdated regulations, led the fight against climate change, and stood up for justice and equity at every turn. None of this would have been possible without you. On this foundation, we will build back better.

Today, I write to you truly optimistic about our future. In the past year, we’ve all struggled and sacrificed. But with cases and hospitalizations dramatically declining, and more than 100,000 doses of vaccine administered, we have once again found hope. The end is in sight. We're ready to bounce back from this economic recession and ensure our workforce is more prepared than ever for success in the modern economy.

In 2009, when I first decided to run for public office and tackle our state's massive unfunded pension liability, you were there. When I decided to take my experience to the Governor’s Office to give our state's economy the jump-start it needed, you were there. And when I faced a tough reelection campaign to continue our work of bringing economic opportunity and mobility to Rhode Islanders in every neighborhood, you were there. Time and time again, you joined the fight on behalf of all Rhode Islanders. I promised you then that I would wake up every day focused on making life better for the people of this state, and I renew that promise today for you and all our fellow Americans.

Over the last ten years, I've learned that there is no limit to what we can accomplish when we work together. I’m forever grateful for your hard work, generosity, and kindness. Your support kept me going through the darkest days, and it's because of you that I have complete confidence in our state's and our nation's future.

So thank you again - from the bottom of my heart. I am so humbled and honored to have taken this journey together.

Sincerely,

Gina

-------------------------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF GINA RAIMONDO |
-------------------------------------------------------------

Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO BOX 40794
Providence RI 02904 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/XugqLWHldPkH4NgXGDVRIX4VAE5FRK9jWY9Rx-CezO4=/60dGonorgjD6pzzArlgOIZaYDsu7KLyHnJpRrFd-71c=

body:
am Kim Reynolds, the governor of the great state of Iowa.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019JKLVpHTmc9YNkqeP4iTemynN5Y2x3jD8tKJBcUWAfX12VWCyRvBAzFRLyLNVoS2-UdKTl4nYkrEo1a4aHd5HN0kccH7hsZooarpOQWA7p0YxN60DeFtwUqVk_Igy6mZvHcCbCJn7COdfnZpF7z_m3h321miUgH4d1DytXnKrYdFp2sqPvBspvUlpdnX16iw-2_yMOOk_KF1W3ohpa464UdyAnp5jmLLy-kNOD9CvbLf0b11UAzpR-iwAyj8tu8xByeFzYaG8JAvdYqx1F6FI968Td0Xt6pBDcHLz8WJYipYkxFpVm3Y0h-ACeMfaR3g06hpPVyHnfnBcUPKZ_zzNh3xB3tUXNBCmmxNIe0EV-kPdFv7wQo3AqipNHroDQzz1oHnTAAwX6wzEy8u0LT_1DkN0ej6GaK2cLYCDLqqU5C3Tp7DXnOm9ktawio7dafw8fIFjibneEUQa_-HzZtslg==&c=CrU65JCPkfE-CoW0aqABLFKD6U5IL_wXIzlZg1d-n-1qhcSiluGybA==&ch=5c9Mel-bu3jXkfNClXIJ1Kwsm6Lpt4AA7QoNPPyCyih1dUtlltAVog==)
Friend,

I am Kim Reynolds, the governor of the great state of Iowa.
Despite all we have been through this past year, I have seen the best of Iowans at every turn. I am so grateful for their tenacity and ability to turn obstacles into opportunities. I believe that Iowa is the greatest state in the nation and we have to keep it that way.
It's why I fought to keep our economy open, to get kids back in school safely, innovating Iowa's workforce, ensuring strong and safe communities, and investing in universal broadband. I am committed to protecting hardworking Iowans and the things that matter most to them.
[**_Will you join my team, Friend?_**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019JKLVpHTmc9YNkqeP4iTemynN5Y2x3jD8tKJBcUWAfX12VWCyRvBAzFRLyLNVoS2-UdKTl4nYkrEo1a4aHd5HN0kccH7hsZooarpOQWA7p0YxN60DeFtwUqVk_Igy6mZvHcCbCJn7COdfnZpF7z_m3h321miUgH4d1DytXnKrYdFp2sqPvBspvUlpdnX16iw-2_yMOOk_KF1W3ohpa464UdyAnp5jmLLy-kNOD9CvbLf0b11UAzpR-iwAyj8tu8xByeFzYaG8JAvdYqx1F6FI968Td0Xt6pBDcHLz8WJYipYkxFpVm3Y0h-ACeMfaR3g06hpPVyHnfnBcUPKZ_zzNh3xB3tUXNBCmmxNIe0EV-kPdFv7wQo3AqipNHroDQzz1oHnTAAwX6wzEy8u0LT_1DkN0ej6GaK2cLYCDLqqU5C3Tp7DXnOm9ktawio7dafw8fIFjibneEUQa_-HzZtslg==&c=CrU65JCPkfE-CoW0aqABLFKD6U5IL_wXIzlZg1d-n-1qhcSiluGybA==&ch=5c9Mel-bu3jXkfNClXIJ1Kwsm6Lpt4AA7QoNPPyCyih1dUtlltAVog==)
**[**Join Team Reynolds**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019JKLVpHTmc9YNkqeP4iTemynN5Y2x3jD8tKJBcUWAfX12VWCyRvBAzFRLyLNVoS2-UdKTl4nYkrEo1a4aHd5HN0kccH7hsZooarpOQWA7p0YxN60DeFtwUqVk_Igy6mZvHcCbCJn7COdfnZpF7z_m3h321miUgH4d1DytXnKrYdFp2sqPvBspvUlpdnX16iw-2_yMOOk_KF1W3ohpa464UdyAnp5jmLLy-kNOD9CvbLf0b11UAzpR-iwAyj8tu8xByeFzYaG8JAvdYqx1F6FI968Td0Xt6pBDcHLz8WJYipYkxFpVm3Y0h-ACeMfaR3g06hpPVyHnfnBcUPKZ_zzNh3xB3tUXNBCmmxNIe0EV-kPdFv7wQo3AqipNHroDQzz1oHnTAAwX6wzEy8u0LT_1DkN0ej6GaK2cLYCDLqqU5C3Tp7DXnOm9ktawio7dafw8fIFjibneEUQa_-HzZtslg==&c=CrU65JCPkfE-CoW0aqABLFKD6U5IL_wXIzlZg1d-n-1qhcSiluGybA==&ch=5c9Mel-bu3jXkfNClXIJ1Kwsm6Lpt4AA7QoNPPyCyih1dUtlltAVog==)**

Growing up in a small town, working paycheck to paycheck, I understand firsthand the challenges working families face every day. I understand that too often we leave behind those looking for a way up. That's why I am fighting for policies that grow jobs, improve the economy, raise wages, and it's why [**we are cutting taxes for every single Iowan.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019JKLVpHTmc9YNkqeP4iTemynN5Y2x3jD8tKJBcUWAfX12VWCyRvBAzFRLyLNVoS2-UdKTl4nYkrEo1a4aHd5HN0kccH7hsZooarpOQWA7p0YxN60DeFtwUqVk_Igy6mZvHcCbCJn7COdfnZpF7z_m3h321miUgH4d1DytXnKrYdFp2sqPvBspvUlpdnX16iw-2_yMOOk_KF1W3ohpa464UdyAnp5jmLLy-kNOD9CvbLf0b11UAzpR-iwAyj8tu8xByeFzYaG8JAvdYqx1F6FI968Td0Xt6pBDcHLz8WJYipYkxFpVm3Y0h-ACeMfaR3g06hpPVyHnfnBcUPKZ_zzNh3xB3tUXNBCmmxNIe0EV-kPdFv7wQo3AqipNHroDQzz1oHnTAAwX6wzEy8u0LT_1DkN0ej6GaK2cLYCDLqqU5C3Tp7DXnOm9ktawio7dafw8fIFjibneEUQa_-HzZtslg==&c=CrU65JCPkfE-CoW0aqABLFKD6U5IL_wXIzlZg1d-n-1qhcSiluGybA==&ch=5c9Mel-bu3jXkfNClXIJ1Kwsm6Lpt4AA7QoNPPyCyih1dUtlltAVog==)

clean_body: am Kim Reynolds, the governor of the great state of Iowa. == Friend, I am Kim Reynolds, the governor of the great state of Iowa. Despite all we have been through this past year, I have seen the best of Iowans at every turn. I am so grateful for their tenacity and ability to turn obstacles into opportunities. I believe that Iowa is the greatest state in the nation and we have to keep it that way. It's why I fought to keep our economy open, to get kids back in school safely, innovating Iowa's workforce, ensuring strong and safe communities, and investing in universal broadband. I am committed to protecting hardworking Iowans and the things that matter most to them. == == Growing up in a small town, working paycheck to paycheck, I understand firsthand the challenges working families face every day. I understand that too often we leave behind those looking for a way up. That's why I am fighting for policies that grow jobs, improve the economy, raise wages, and it's why == == I have a bold agenda to make Iowa the best state in the nation to live, work, go to school, and raise a family. My plan includes: Putting Students First: We brought kids back to school safely and now I am working to give parents the choice of where they can send their kid to school. Investing in high-speed internet Innovative workforce policies that make Iowa the destination for building successful careers and lives Supporting our brave men and women in law enforcement Improving access to quality health care And so much more... I am proud to push forward with a bold agenda that enables every single Iowan to reach their full potential. But as you can imagine, the other side is working around the clock to roll back our progress and make it harder to get things done. == == Friend, I am so honored to have the opportunity to serve and I know with your support, Iowa is coming back and coming back strong! Thank you, Governor Kim Reynolds == Get involved with Team Reynolds Today! Follow us on == and ==. == To receive text updates text KIM to 47682. Paid for by The Kim Reynolds for Iowa Committee P.O. Friend,

body:
As Americans, we have the right to FREE SPEECH.

Not censored speech. Not cancelled speech. Not designated "Free Speech Zones."

FREE. SPEECH. PERIOD.

**Defend your freedom of speech before it 's too late!**

Peter,

_Here’s the situation that small business owners in America are facing right now:_
* Over **100,000** small businesses have closed forever since the beginning of 2020!
* **800** small businesses are shutting down every day!
* Small businesses are still dealing with **curfews** and **capacity restrictions**!

_There’s no denying that these lockdown restrictions have been incredibly damaging to America’s small business community. Yet, Democrat politicians and governors continue to threaten Americans with rolling lockdowns and ever-changing rules._

However, I have a feeling the average American doesn’t agree with strict lockdown policies. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. I’ve put together this 🔴 LIVE 🔴 Small Business Poll that ends at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT!_[Peter, do you think it’s time to end these restrictions on small businesses?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=cd36c1069fb144fba62b07901e5366d0&_e=vCVR8eZgu2DmVLwE4yq-xQofe0CRNeOMLV426Ii8Zpa3WX-d_IyMaQZ68hwIYhmY9gK7_jARLtxJU0QRDZua6Q9QXUYDBmNrbF8gkaT4k3uUucI5ERnv4Yxq_eTB19NNkQWJOD44fup-IHlPfMhptHI_0r4_Ay0siAjXeu6TagrTBw1uJ2-jdssvBW-iASpOpe6OKnl7697jzeKefhpGOXQDZhGQfFRcEZ1BQefcr0nv6d_hRBK6Pmx7TYctJat8Q69GhNwBIiKMDoRg3nneDpn-xzeB2nlHe0JzDXY5UixHiw8VAf86tBGSG8wgzt9MU0Fe7aJcpQButwnHxoGPRYcI8pCT7-u-bNVmJsT5ERs-NBhKrDGseQ3bWJjzuwWj_wsvtNz-simaiBDdkXymE-vJywjDfOcDpTSC6nsyLxyL8aqu_VnBuGnEQkn2UZxIaYKLp4S5L78i8EHpSByMwzw42zfhjZG2IEII4XPaVL2ISHjwrp9rxXbJvDYeRmT0)_**

Peter, our small businesses have gone above and beyond to comply with these restrictions.

They’ve had to change the entire way they do business, they’ve had to invest their own money to stay open, and yet Democrat politicians still won’t be straight with them.

The Democrats are already attacking me (_21 months away from my next election_) with ads rooted in _**WILD CONSPIRACY THEORIES!**_

_I’ve been fighting their Socialist policies with everything I’ve got since the day I stepped foot on Capitol Hill, and they know I’ll never back down in my fight to keep America free._

_So why are they wasting time giving life to disturbing conspiracy theories just to attack me**21 MONTHS** before an election?!_

**Because they are terrified of me! And they should be. I am a threat to the very narrative of the Democrat party - I’m Socialism’s worst nightmare. **

I am a 1st Generation American who has lived out the American Dream, a dedicated mother who has also had a long and successful career in journalism, and am a part of the next generation of unstoppable Republican women!

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden’s Radical Immigration Agenda
body:
America is facing a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration from the dangerously radical Biden Immigration Agenda!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

America is facing _a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration_ from the dangerously **radical Biden Immigration Agenda!**
We've already seen a new border surge of illegal entries (from 17,000 last April to 70,000 in November) who understand that Joe Biden's Immigration Agenda is a more liberal, open-door approach to immigration law enforcement. But that's an understatement...
...the Biden Immigration Agenda is going to be bad for America and includes:

* Reversing most of the Trump immigration agenda from deportations to asylum policy, including defunding wall construction, expanding visas and refugee caps, granting amnesty to over 600,000 illegal immigrants who fall under Obama's Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals program (DACA) and putting limits on U.S. immigration and Customs Enforcement agents.

* Rescinding President's Trump's immigration restrictions on 13 countries that help keep us safe from foreign terrorists, and they are eager to begin undoing these and most all of the approximately 400 high-profile immigration policy changes made by the Trump administration.

Then there's the Left's really radical plan - "ABOLISH ICE!" (Immigration & Customs Enforcement) and "comprehensive immigration reform" (code phrase for _amnesty_) to complete the "open borders" nightmare... and that's without considering the national security, election integrity, public health and other quality-of-life issues we will be expected to pay for.
Biden's immigration agenda _represents the most important issue facing the United States_ ...and Judicial Watch is _already ramping up our courtroom strategies of challenging the radical Biden immigration agenda at as many levels as possible_.
So please rest assured, we are _not_ stopping...in fact, if anything _we 're beefing up_.
_We continue to add new resources and double up on others with our eyes firmly fixed on two great_ _principles_ : Support for the rule of law (especially our laws against illegal immigration) and the right of the American people to know what their government is doing.
And that's why I hope **_[you will make your most generous donation to Judicial Watch right now!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52832&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMDQxNjM1MTA=)_**
Your support will help ensure that Judicial Watch's voice and your voice...the voice of law-abiding American citizens...will be heard _loud and clear_ in the debate over immigration, including any effort to grant "amnesty" to illegal aliens!
But, as you know, Judicial Watch doesn't just complain about illegal immigration --

* We sue state and local public officials who violate federal immigration laws by establishing so-called "sanctuary" policies that protect criminal aliens;

* We fight for accurate voter rolls in the courts to protect the integrity of our elections; and

* We force the federal government to reveal documents about bureaucratic efforts to grant amnesty and publicly funded services to illegal aliens through backdoor, "stealth" methods.

I really cannot think of another time in our twenty-seven year history when there has been so urgent a need for Judicial Watch to be at our best...
...because if we're not on the job this year, it simply won't get done.
We are conservative, we are independent, and we are not beholden to political parties.
We are fighting for you and the rule of law, and we _can_ meet our challenges if you **_[stand with us today by making your best tax-deductible donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52832&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMDQxNjM1MTA=)_**. Thank you!
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President
P.S. Judicial Watch has two active lawsuits challenging "sanctuary" cities in court _and we are scheduled to_ _go to trial this spring in our challenge to San Francisco 's deadly sanctuary policy_. Please **_[donate now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52832&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMDQxNjM1MTA=)_**.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52832&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMDQxNjM1MTA=)

Derek, The GOP Leader in the U.S. House of Representatives, Kevin McCarthy, declined yesterday to take action against Marjorie Taylor Greene’s despicable comments. This is a woman who has suggested that the California wildfires were caused by “Jewish Space Lasers” and supported the execution of Nancy Pelosi. **Look, Derek, I’ve dealt with right-wing extremists for a long time -- but Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene are different and their growing power in the Republican party should scare the daylights out of all of us.** Today, the House will vote to remove Marjorie Taylor Greene from all of her committee appointments. name: Jarrin Jackson
subject: We Support Marjorie Taylor Greene.
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)
---

Hi Peter,

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the Chair of Drain the DC Swamp PAC. We fight the Swamp of BOTH parties, and support the best America First Conservatives around the country! [Now more than ever, it's important that you join me in that fight](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)!

Tonight, I saw that Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy attacked pro-Trump Georgia Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, while backing anti-Trump neocon Liz Cheney.

_**BIG MISTAKE KEVIN!**_

In 2020, Drain the DC Swamp PAC spent heavily to support Rep. Taylor Greene as she won her first election to Congress. We were proud to back up this America First superstar- and she has NOT disappointed us AT ALL!

We wish there were 400 more like her- and absolutely NONE like Liz Cheney.

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)
---

McCarthy may face a primary challenger himself after backing Liz Cheney though:

_With support from Mr McCarthy and House Minority Whip Steve Scalise, Ms Cheney clinched a vote of confidence on Wednesday after she defended her vote to impeach the former president for his role in the attacks on the halls of Congress. She said at the time that there has “never been a greater betrayal by a president of the United States of his office and his oath to the Constitution.”_

_Her vote prompted protests from Republican lawmakers in her home state of Wyoming, threats of censure, and potential primary challenges in 2022._

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)
---

**Kevin McCarthy gave up. He attacked the pro-Trump star while defending the weak never Trumper, Liz Cheney.**

**President Trump never gave up. That's why we loved him! He never let the media or the Dems dictate the agenda.**

_Drain the DC Swamp PAC will ALWAYS back the fighters like Marjorie Taylor Greene_... and we will back the primary challenge to Liz Cheney in Wyoming!

We need to elect America First conservatives! Leaders like Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Ted Cruz, and the Freedom Caucus are what we need! [Let's fight back against the weak Republicans like Liz Cheney!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)

Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the anti-Lincoln Project. They use people, they surrender. We lift people up, and we fight! They are whiny Leftists. We are the America First pro-Trump Super PAC!

**We are joining Trump's fight to oust the RINOs. Let's punish the Liz Cheneys of Congress. [Help us fight for the Republic!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)**

_The old GOP is gone. Time to make the GOP a pro-Trump, America First party. No more Cheneys, Bushes, McCains, or Romneys!_

No more surrendering. Time to fight! [Will you help us?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)

We won't let the Never Trumpers like Cheney get away with this. [Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will help us give muscle to conservatives](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)- get them the firepower they need to beat the establishment!

The time for navel-gazing is over. [Help us push forward and fight for America](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)!

More of MJT. Less of Liz Cheney. Sound good?

We have primaries for a reason: throwing out those that abuse our trust & good faith!

[Donate now.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)

Respectfully,
[ ](secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1)
---
|
---

Jarrin Jackson
Chairman
Drain the DC Swamp PAC

P.S. Frauds like John Kerry and AOC can be beaten! [Donate right now to help us fight for America.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=iLREEQWmkrcqI4c&b=loHlOKBSeSwGDKJ5edmaOg)

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwc7Jys7GxM) [Change subscriber options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwc7Jys7GxM)

| Patriot,
Liberals in D.C. are focused on the wrong agenda for America. There is no time for political games; our people and our economy need immediate action.
There are 12.6 million unemployed Americans today. These hardworking patriots need reassurance and a working plan to get them back in the workforce.

For Florida, Team Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: We're Moving Up North
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_re&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **We're facing a roadblock. A handful of****Democrats in the Minnesota House betrayed their voters and are now protecting Governor Walz' Emergency Powers. This would lead lesser groups to give up and quit. But not us!** The stakes are getting even bigger now. Just this Monday, a group of legislators [introduced a bill in the Minnesota House](https://www.action4liberty.com/legislators_introduce_mask_mandate_bill_in_mn_house?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_re&n=2) that would make Governor Walz' mask mandate into permanent law. It would require you and me to wear a face covering anytime we are in a public building or business and it would fine us for noncompliance. Business owners who don't comply - well, they face up to 90 days of jail time. Sound familiar? This bill just mirrors what Governor Walz decreed already last summer. But unlike his illegal, unconstitutional and unilateral dictate, this would codify things into law. It's becoming more clear by the day what these politicians really want - more power over us. We're watching legislators on both sides of the aisle right now waste time in a committee tasked to draft a Fake End Walz' Power bill. They're even lecturing us on how we can appropriately petition our government. Last Friday, Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard, two of the six Democrat targets, [accused you and me of being "right wing, wack jobs" who are "intimidating them"](https://www.action4liberty.com/rep_lislegard_calls_you_whack_job?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_re&n=3). Even RINO lobbyist legislator Kurt Daudt joined with them in throwing you and me under the bus by stating how Republicans in St Paul do not condone you and me knocking on legislators' doors. What are they talking about?
## The State Capitol is closed to the public right now. We can't even meet with our legislators there!
Meanwhile, legislators are meeting remotely, using their homes to conduct business. Are they saying we no longer can petition our government for a redress of grievances? Of course, it's a one way street. These same crony politicians show up to our doors every election year, begging for our vote so they can get re-elected. But they don't want us knocking their doors demanding they vote better? As they raise the stakes and do more to encroach on our lives, we have two options. Do what most pitiful Republican groups in this state do and just give up. Democrats are used to a bunch of quitters as opposition. There's a reason they keep getting away with things.
## Or...
We up the ante. And that's exactly what we are doing at Action 4 Liberty. We are going to make these politicians' lives miserable, because quite frankly, that's what Governor Walz' Emergency Powers are doing to us and our beloved business owners. **Starting this weekend, Action 4 Liberty is moving up north into Reps Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard's districts. We are deploying a full time team of doorknockers and activists who will talk to every voter and find every supporter who shares our view to End Walz' Emergency Powers for good.** Our team will stand on street corners holding signs. They'll organize protests and build a larger activist footprint in their districts. And they'll meet with business owners impacted by Walz' orders and engage them in this fight. We already rented a home and hired more operators so we can double down our efforts. If these crony politicians think things were rough in January, they have a whole new thing coming their way. Sandstede and Lislegard are showing their true colors! When Rep Erik Mortensen brought forward the motion to End Walz' Emergency Powers, they sided with fringe, metro Democrats to protect their Governor. Their votes last year to End Walz' Emergency Powers were nothing more than a con. Our team will make sure their voters know about it. **Did you know that Julie Sandstede only won her election by 30 votes? And Donald Trump beat Sleepy Joe Biden by 5 points in Dave Lislegard's district last November. Voting to protect Governor Walz WILL cost them their seats! We'll make sure of that.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_re&n=4 "Support Our Field Operations") [Support Our Field Operations](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_re&n=5)
---
**What makes Action 4 Liberty different than most other groups in this state is that we refuse to quit - we owe it to you and all our supporters to find a way to win. We can't allow our system of government to be hijacked by these politicians any longer.**
I know it seems hopeless at times. Democrats are surging nationally \- emboldened by Joe Biden's victory. And their buddies in Big Tech and the media are doing their best to steer the people's attention away from their extreme, anti-liberty COVID response and towards the surge at the U.S. Capitol.
This isn't the first time we had a road block. When we started this battle back in April of last year, we only had 15 Republicans on board in the House for the first vote. So we put pressure on House Republicans to get on board. By the end of the month, we had all 59 of them.
In May, we couldn't get the Republican Senate to even bring up the Resolution for a vote. So we increased the pressure on Senate leadership, and by June we had them passing the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution.
**Causing pain for politicians works. And we know the best places to put the pressure.[I hope we can count on you to help us out](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mask_mandate_bill_re&n=6).**
By moving Action 4 Liberty up north, we will be making their lives miserable because they will hear from voters, business owners, neighbors and friends around the clock. Our team will identify swing voters and recruit candidates and activists to run campaigns. We'll stand on street corners and hold up signs. How would you like to see activists with signs that say:
# Julie Sandstede Betrayed YOU!
The Democrat establishment is growing more worried by the day that Action 4 Liberty and, the hundreds of thousands of people who support us, are not backing down. We are forcing their most vulnerable members to go down with the sinking ship of Walz' popularity in Greater Minnesota.
Help us continue fighting through these obstacles so we can End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. Let's make sure bills like this Mask Mandate have no chance of passing. And let's return our system of government back to its constitutional roots!

clean_body: | Peter \-- We're facing a roadblock. A handful ofDemocrats in the Minnesota House betrayed their voters and are now protecting Governor Walz' Emergency Powers. This would lead lesser groups to give up and quit. But not us! The stakes are getting even bigger now. Just this Monday, a group of legislators that would make Governor Walz' mask mandate into permanent law. It would require you and me to wear a face covering anytime we are in a public building or business and it would fine us for noncompliance. Business owners who don't comply - well, they face up to 90 days of jail time. Sound familiar? This bill just mirrors what Governor Walz decreed already last summer. But unlike his illegal, unconstitutional and unilateral dictate, this would codify things into law. It's becoming more clear by the day what these politicians really want - more power over us. We're watching legislators on both sides of the aisle right now waste time in a committee tasked to draft a Fake End Walz' Power bill. They're even lecturing us on how we can appropriately petition our government. Last Friday, Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard, two of the six Democrat targets, . Even RINO lobbyist legislator Kurt Daudt joined with them in throwing you and me under the bus by stating how Republicans in St Paul do not condone you and me knocking on legislators' doors. What are they talking about? The State Capitol is closed to the public right now. We can't even meet with our legislators there! Meanwhile, legislators are meeting remotely, using their homes to conduct business. Are they saying we no longer can petition our government for a redress of grievances? Of course, it's a one way street. These same crony politicians show up to our doors every election year, begging for our vote so they can get re-elected. But they don't want us knocking their doors demanding they vote better? As they raise the stakes and do more to encroach on our lives, we have two options. Do what most pitiful Republican groups in this state do and just give up. Democrats are used to a bunch of quitters as opposition. There's a reason they keep getting away with things. Or... We up the ante. And that's exactly what we are doing at Action 4 Liberty. We are going to make these politicians' lives miserable, because quite frankly, that's what Governor Walz' Emergency Powers are doing to us and our beloved business owners. Starting this weekend, Action 4 Liberty is moving up north into Reps Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard's districts. We are deploying a full time team of doorknockers and activists who will talk to every voter and find every supporter who shares our view to End Walz' Emergency Powers for good. Our team will stand on street corners holding signs. They'll organize protests and build a larger activist footprint in their districts. And they'll meet with business owners impacted by Walz' orders and engage them in this fight. We already rented a home and hired more operators so we can double down our efforts. If these crony politicians think things were rough in January, they have a whole new thing coming their way. Sandstede and Lislegard are showing their true colors! When Rep Erik Mortensen brought forward the motion to End Walz' Emergency Powers, they sided with fringe, metro Democrats to protect their Governor. Their votes last year to End Walz' Emergency Powers were nothing more than a con. Our team will make sure their voters know about it. Did you know that Julie Sandstede only won her election by 30 votes? And Donald Trump beat Sleepy Joe Biden by 5 points in Dave Lislegard's district last November. Voting to protect Governor Walz WILL cost them their seats! We'll make sure of that. | "Support Our Field Operations" What makes Action 4 Liberty different than most other groups in this state is that we refuse to quit - we owe it to you and all our supporters to find a way to win. We can't allow our system of government to be hijacked by these politicians any longer. I know it seems hopeless at times. Democrats are surging nationally \- emboldened by Joe Biden's victory. And their buddies in Big Tech and the media are doing their best to steer the people's attention away from their extreme, anti-liberty COVID response and towards the surge at the U.S. Capitol. This isn't the first time we had a road block. When we started this battle back in April of last year, we only had 15 Republicans on board in the House for the first vote. So we put pressure on House Republicans to get on board. By the end of the month, we had all 59 of them. In May, we couldn't get the Republican Senate to even bring up the Resolution for a vote. So we increased the pressure on Senate leadership, and by June we had them passing the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution. Causing pain for politicians works. And we know the best places to put the pressure.. By moving Action 4 Liberty up north, we will be making their lives miserable because they will hear from voters, business owners, neighbors and friends around the clock. Our team will identify swing voters and recruit candidates and activists to run campaigns. We'll stand on street corners and hold up signs. How would you like to see activists with signs that say: Julie Sandstede Betrayed YOU! The Democrat establishment is growing more worried by the day that Action 4 Liberty and, the hundreds of thousands of people who support us, are not backing down. We are forcing their most vulnerable members to go down with the sinking ship of Walz' popularity in Greater Minnesota. Help us continue fighting through these obstacles so we can End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. Let's make sure bills like this Mask Mandate have no chance of passing. And let's return our system of government back to its constitutional roots! Can I count on you to help us make things more painful for these politicians. name: Moms Against Hate
subject: Marjorie Must Go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moms in Office
body:
Peter
The House voted Thursday evening to remove Republican Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene from her committee assignments.
**The final vote tally was 230-199 and only 11 Republicans voted with Democrats.**
Marjorie Taylor Greene's behavior is disturbing and the Republican Party's forgiving mood is extremely concerning.
Her removal from her assignement should have been a unanimous decision across party lines.
**Eventhough Donald Trump is no longer in the White House, his allies are flaming the flames of hate in the Halls of Congress.**
Rep. Greene was in favor of executing top Democrats, including Speaker Nancy Pelosi; suggested a number of school shootings were secretly perpetrated by the government; and repeatedly spread anti-Semitic and Islamophobic conspiracy theories.
In the last 48 hours, Marjorie Taylor Greene raised over $300,000 from her supporters across America.
**She never said 'I am sorry". She only strenghteed her base.**
Removing her from her commitee assignement is a good first step, but we can't stop here. Help us stand up to hate and[**join us**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24643692/271373844/-1644589594?refcode=marjorie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlOGY0Y2JmLTU5NjctZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PcgPp7xjhvDCbWjwMkyF8wwRSC2zzcXi3AJdDA43tks=) in asking for her resignation.
This is not about partisanship. This is about decency, truth and the health of our Democracy.
**A white supremacist who mocked the killing of children has no place in our Congress. **
**Today, I am not just concerned as citizen, I am profoundly worried as a mom that my son could grow up in a country where a lawmaker holding national political office shows no regard for his safety and the lives of children. **
Will you**[help us](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24643693/271373845/-1644589594?refcode=marjorie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlOGY0Y2JmLTU5NjctZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PcgPp7xjhvDCbWjwMkyF8wwRSC2zzcXi3AJdDA43tks=)** train and support women across the country to fill the seats of 199 Republicans who allowed Greene to go unpunished?
I am coming to you directly, because today, I need your support. I need you to stand with me and Moms in Office and fight against hate in our country. Can I count on you?
**Sincerely,**
**Simona Grace**
**Founder, Moms in Office**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24643694/271373846/-2094846095?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlOGY0Y2JmLTU5NjctZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PcgPp7xjhvDCbWjwMkyF8wwRSC2zzcXi3AJdDA43tks=)
